commit_scope: Standard-receipt attestation for the form-cli self-healing memory work (rag-key.fk content key via adler32 over bytes, rag-freshness.fk drift delta, rag-adaptive-k.fk retrieval depth, rag-heal.fk host-io heal lane on the kernel). This is a documentation artifact: it reads the per-claim receipt shape from docs/coherence-substrate/standard-receipt.form (body / c-bootstrap / toolchain-free / platforms{mac,windows,android} / honest-floor) and records the CURRENT honest state per platform, observing only what is observable on this mac. Honest floor today: mac four-way OBSERVED via validate.sh on this machine (Apple metal), windows four-way OBSERVED via merged PR #3623's windows-floor check, android PENDING (no device), and the full standard receipt — c-bootstrap fkwu form-cli toolchain-free (no go/rust/clang/bash/python) — PENDING on every platform. The kernels are still Go/Rust/TS-built walkers plus fkwu emitted tables + native exe; mac/windows four-way is the LESSER rung below the bar, named as such, never inflated to the c-bootstrap toolchain-free receipt.

standard_receipt.claim: The form-cli self-healing memory logic (content key, freshness delta, adaptive depth, heal lane) lives in Form and crosses the four-way floor incl. the fkwu arm.
standard_receipt.body: yes — rag-key.fk / rag-freshness.fk / rag-adaptive-k.fk are Form recipes the universal kernel (fkwu) runs; rag-heal.fk is the host-io heal lane on the kernel.
standard_receipt.c_bootstrap: pending — kernels are Go/Rust/TS-built today; fkwu runs as emitted pre-flattened tables + native exe, not yet a C-bootstrap-emitted form-cli on any platform.
standard_receipt.toolchain_free: pending — mac/windows four-way is observed via validate.sh (bash) with the Go/Rust/TS walkers present; no go/rust/clang/bash/python-free form-cli run is observed yet.

platforms.mac: observed (four-way floor) — toolchain-free + c-bootstrap PENDING. Trace: this thread's local validate.sh runs on Apple metal (see local_validation).
platforms.windows: observed (four-way floor) — toolchain-free + c-bootstrap PENDING. Trace: merged PR #3623 windows-floor check 'Prove the Form-native floor (four-way with fkwu on Windows)' = pass, run 28104595445/job/83215270837.
platforms.android: pending — no device available this session; not faked.

standard_receipt.honest_floor: The Form logic crosses FOUR-WAY (fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way + fkwu, 0 divergent) on mac via validate.sh and on windows via the windows-floor CI check. That is the four-way floor — the LESSER rung — observed via bash-driven validate.sh with Go/Rust/TS walkers present plus fkwu pre-flattened tables. It is NOT the standard receipt: a Go-built kernel is not c-bootstrap, bash-driven validate.sh is not toolchain-free. The full bar (c-bootstrap fkwu form-cli, toolchain-free, on mac+windows+android real metal) is pending on every platform.

evidence_refs: RECEIPT MATRIX (honest, per platform): mac = four-way OBSERVED (toolchain-free pending), windows = four-way OBSERVED (toolchain-free pending), android = PENDING (no device), c-bootstrap-toolchain-free = PENDING (Go/Rust/TS-built kernels + fkwu emitted tables today, not the C-bootstrap toolchain-free form-cli the standard receipt names).

MAC four-way OBSERVED on this Apple metal via validate.sh (still Go/Rust/TS-built kernels + fkwu pre-flattened tables, NOT c-bootstrap, NOT toolchain-free): ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/adler32.fk form-stdlib/rag-key.fk form-stdlib/tests/rag-key-band.fk -> '✓ core.fk+adler32.fk+rag-key.fk+rag-key-band.fk → 7' + 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)' + '1 ok, 0 divergent — kernels agree on every sample.'

MAC four-way OBSERVED: ./validate.sh form-stdlib/rag-freshness.fk form-stdlib/tests/rag-freshness-band.fk -> '✓ rag-freshness.fk+rag-freshness-band.fk → 63' + 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)' + '1 ok, 0 divergent'.

MAC four-way OBSERVED: ./validate.sh form-stdlib/rag-adaptive-k.fk form-stdlib/tests/rag-adaptive-k-band.fk -> '✓ rag-adaptive-k.fk+rag-adaptive-k-band.fk → 15' + 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)' + '1 ok, 0 divergent'.

WINDOWS four-way OBSERVED via merged PR #3623 'windows-floor' GitHub check, which ran 'Prove the Form-native floor (four-way with fkwu on Windows)' and passed: gh pr checks 3623 --repo seeker71/Coherence-Network -> 'windows-floor  pass  7m24s  https://github.com/seeker71/Coherence-Network/actions/runs/28104595445/job/83215270837'. c-bootstrap + toolchain-free PENDING (windows-latest CI kernel is built, not C-bootstrap toolchain-free form-cli).

ANDROID PENDING: no Android device available this session; not faked. The fkwu standalone android row exists historically (commit_evidence_2026-06-23_fkwu_field_android_row.json) for the binary, but a toolchain-free c-bootstrap form-cli run of THESE rag bands on android is not observed here.

C-BOOTSTRAP / TOOLCHAIN-FREE PENDING on all platforms: per docs/coherence-substrate/standard-receipt.form, four-way-in-CI is NOT the platform receipt, a Go-built form-cli is NOT c-bootstrap, and bash-driven validate.sh is NOT toolchain-free. The full standard receipt (fkwu form-cli emitted from the C bootstrap, run on mac+windows+android real metal with no go/rust/clang/bash/python) is the work still to do, not a claim made here.
